heading.description: ATX-style headings from level 1 to 6 using hash characters

paragraph.description: Block of text separated by blank lines, the default text element

link.description: Inline hyperlink with display text, URL, and optional title attribute

image.description: Image embed with alt text, source URL, and optional title

code_inline.description: Inline code span rendered in monospace font for variable names and short code

code_block.description: Fenced code block with optional language identifier for syntax highlighting

list.description: Ordered (numbered) or unordered (bulleted) list of items

blockquote.description: Block quotation indicated by greater-than prefix on each line

table.description: GFM table with header row, separator row, and data rows using pipe characters
